description: This file contains unit tests for the HistoryRepository component in an Android project. It tests adding entries, listing them in the correct order, and clearing the repository. It also defines an in-memory implementation of the HistoryStore interface for testing purposes.

classes.name: HistoryRepositoryAndroidTest
classes.description: Test class for the HistoryRepository, containing unit tests for adding, listing, and clearing history entries. Also includes a private in-memory store implementation for testing purposes.

classes.name: InMemoryStore
classes.description: An in-memory implementation of the HistoryStore interface used exclusively for testing the HistoryRepository.

methods.name: addAndList_returnsNewestFirst_andCaps
methods.description: Tests that adding entries to the repository results in the correct order (most recent first) and enforces maxItems limit.

methods.name: clear_emptiesStore
methods.description: Tests that calling clear on the repository empties its stored entries.
